$comment: GENERATED by contracts/codegen/generate.py from episode.schema.yaml - DO NOT EDIT.
description: The central join-point episode record (sidecar + operational, resolved as-of recorded_at) — CONTRACT §3.2.

archive.description: 0/1 — soft discard (DESCARTAR; archive bucket, not training set).

bimanual_episode_id.description: Fob-injected shared L/R id; pairs the two wrist cams of ONE take (distinct from episode_id).

display_id.description: DERIVED human handle <YYYYMMDD>_<operator>_<station>_<NNNNNN>; never a key (§7).

episode_id.description: UUIDv4 pairing/join key, minted by the fob, identical on both arms (§7). The ONLY join key.

episode_ordinal.description: The fob label ordinal (the label-join source).

global_episode_seq.description: NAND swap-proof monotonic ordinal — the PRIMARY ordering spine (card is not a unit).

ingested_at.description: When ingest froze this episode; null pre-ingest (WARN here, distinct from release where it is HARD).

kit_id.description: The kit (from the fob, §3.3). HARD-non-empty — decides canonical naming + pairing.

needs_review.description: Flagged for review (identity/pairing disagreement; never silently overwrite, §3.3).

paired.description: Left+right paired (only paired non-void episodes are training/QA-able, §4.2).

pairing_anomaly.description: episode_id pairing disagreed with the ordinal cross-check (C-12).

pairing_method.description: How L/R were paired (C-12). Hard enum, but the one MOST likely to need a future additive value — eyes open (§5).

person_id.description: Operator/person (roster binding keyed by kit, as-of recorded_at, §3.3).

recorded_at.description: Fob NTP wallclock (authoritative); the as-of anchor for reference resolution (§3.2, C-10).

side.description: Camera side (from camera NAND, §3.3; domain-closed enum). HARD-non-empty — decides L/R pairing.

task_id.description: Task identity (the task menu entry; prompt resolved as-of via the task entity).

void.description: Voided by flag. void==true REQUIRES void_reason (cross-field rule, OQ-11/§3.2).

void_reason.description: Why voided (required when void==true; the hand-written overlay rule).

title: Episode
